title: aquilegia flabellata var. pumila
intro: Aquilegia flabellata var. pumila, commonly known as Dwarf Fan Columbine, is a plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It is a small, flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia, used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Aquilegia flabellata var. pumila include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
